text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's it for today's concert! If you liked the show,
try to remember my name, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
As if we'd forget!
Keep up the good work, Falcooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehe! Thanks, everyone! See you at the next
performance! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Today's performance was electric! It was like they
couldn't stop shouting my name!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Falco fever is spreading like wildfire! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Or is that a bit much?
choice_data_list:
There's no doubt you're getting a lot of
attention.

text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has been steadily securing victories.
As proof of her popularity as a rising star on dirt...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Blog?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, this blogger specializes in dirt races?
That's pretty rare. Let me see...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
"I used to only care about the races themselves,
but Smart Falcon has shown me the true potential
of the winning concerts."

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
"I'd like to wrap up this weekly review by
expressing my gratitude for everything she's
doing. Good luck on becoming a top Umadol,
Falco!"

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa!
choice_data_list: Looks like "Umadol" is starting to catch on.
Looks like "Umadol" is starting to catch on.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... I hope so.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't that long ago when my fanbase was small
enough to count.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now I've got all these people cheering for me all
of a sudden.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has such high hopes for me, so I want to
work really hard...
choice_data_list: Gotta become a top Umadol, huh?
Gotta become a top Umadol, huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's right!
On our way back to campus...

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Another great performance! Falco really
brings the heat when she's in the center!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, I think those two people were at my performance!
choice_data_list: Do you want to talk to them?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Absolutely not!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm off the clock now, after all. Now, if they were to approach me, then I'd pull out all the stops and—

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text: But it's kind of a shame, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
If she's aiming to be the top on dirt, that means
she probably won't be running the Classic Triple
Crown, right?

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, I guess not. I mean, she probably chose
dirt because she doesn't have the aptitude for
turf.

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But don't you want to hear someone with her kind
of energy sing "Winning the Soul"?

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know what you mean. Imagine how hype it
would be seeing her up on stage at the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Falco would look so cool spinning the
stand mic.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, r-right... We should head back too!
